action.reasoning: Observation: I now have all the info needed - pathfinder.find_path works with habitat_sim.ShortestPath object, path has points I can follow. The geodesic distance is 11.3m. Analysis: I need to write a complete navmesh-based predict.py that: 1) Plans path to human using navmesh, 2) Follows waypoints, 3) Maintains 1-2m social distance while facing human. The action space is [-20, 20] for both lin and ang vel. Decision: Write complete predict.py with navmesh pathfinding and submit eval immediately to get baseline score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output /tmp/test_output.json 2>/dev/null | head -20
